---
title: "Signals of personality and health: The contributions of facial shape, skin texture, and viewing angle"
authors: "Jones, A. L., Kramer, R., & Ward, R."
year: 2012
date: 2012-01-01
pub-journal: "Journal of Experimental Psychology: Human Perception and Performance"
volume: "38(6)"
pages: "1353–1361"
doi: "10.1037/a0027078"
pdf: "assets/papers/2012/Jones, Kramer, & Ward 2012.pdf"
categories: [first-impressions, morphometrics]
---
